ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the station is in */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the station is in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Address or location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_stations_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_stations_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station that collected the measurement */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant being measured */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the measurement was taken */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag indicating the reliability of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "health_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health data record */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the health data is for */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the health data is for */,
  "ed_annual_adult_rate_per10k" REAL /* Emergency department annual adult rate per 10,000 population */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough the neighborhood is in */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the visualization is for */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map, graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV, JSON) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_metadata" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_sensors" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed at the station */,
  "removal_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was removed from the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "sensor_id")
)
